_source: sequential runs 1-2 (docs/evals/2026-07-20-run-1.md, -run-2.md); parallel runs excluded — API contention inflates per-case durations 2-6x (run 3 finding)
_policy: soft ceilings: run-evals.sh prints 'within'/'REGRESSED', never fails the case; update ceilings after each accepted sequential run

n-plus-one.basis: run 2: 96s (main-thread audit, no doomed subagent) + headroom

action.basis: run 2 timed out at the 1200s cap; run-4 target is finishing under it

tests.basis: run 2: 681s (qa 448s pre-scope-rule; run 3 qa stage fell to 130s)
